title: Tyler Technologies Extends Contract for Digital Government and Payment Solutions in the State of Mississippi
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #Mississippi--Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TYL) today announced that the state of Mississippi has extended its contract for Tyler's award-winning digital government and payments services. The two-year extension builds upon the existing 11-year relationship with Tyler's subsidiary, NIC. Throughout Mississippi, NIC currently provides more than 100 state and local government entities with over 340 digital government services, including online hunting and fishing licenses, drive

title: Tyler Technologies: A Stable Yet Pricey Software Business
text: Tyler Technologies ( TYL , Financial) may not be the typical hyper-growth tech play, but it is a highly stable company dealing in a relatively underrated domain – government software. The company has achieved decent top-line growth over the years, and its recent acquisition of NIC is being integrated well into the organization and generating strong synergies.

title: Oregon Dispatch Agency Selects Tyler Technologies' Solution Suite for Improved Computer Aided Dispatch
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TYL--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with the city of Salem in Oregon for Tyler's Enterprise CAD solution.

text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Tyler Technologies Completes First Phase of State of Kansas Supervision Implementation
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #Kansas--Tyler Technologies completes the first phase of its state of Kansas supervision implementation in six counties.

title: Tyler (TYL) Offers New Jersey Economic Intelligence Solution
text: Tyler (TYL) provides Economic Intelligence solution and Data & Insights offering to New Jersey's Office of Information Technology to help understand economic trends.

title: State of New Jersey Using Tyler Technologies' Solution to Understand Economic Data
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #NewJersey--Tyler Technologies announced that the state of New Jersey Office of Information Technology has gone live with the Economic Intelligence solution.

title: Kansas' Most Populous County to Use Tyler Technologies' Street-Level Imaging Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #Kansas--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with Johnson County, Kansas, for its Sketch and Desktop Verification software, powered by Tyler Verify.

title: North Carolina Implements Statewide Electronic Citation Solution from Tyler Technologies
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TYL--Tyler Technologies announced the North Carolina Administrative Office of the Courts has gone live with Tyler's Electronic Citation solution.
